title: Keepsake Box Baby Girl - Gift Box for Baby, Two Ready to Fill Pink Cases with Satin Ribbon and Tag for Small & Medium Sized, Baby Gift Box, Baby Gift Box Empty, Baby Box DIY Shower Gift for Baby Girl
features: Create Your Own Gift Set: Personalise with our newborn gift box set, perfect for baby girl hampers. Includes 2 empty keepsake boxes with satin ribbon & message tag. Ideal for a unique baby girl keepsake. Sizes: Large 25x17.5x8.5 cm, Small 22.8x15.5x7 cm.

Baby Shower Gifts: Elevate any baby shower with our sophisticated baby girl gift hamper. Designed for small to medium items, its elegance is enhanced by the included pink ribbon, making it the perfect choice for a memorable baby girl hamper.

Value for Money: Our pair of boxes serves as a timeless keepsake for cherished items like mittens and shoes. Combining a memory box with a treasure chest, it’s perfect for storing baby girl keepsakes and new baby treasures.

Making the Right Choice: Baby Box Shop is your go-to for baby girl memory boxes and keepsakes. Our practical and delightful boxes are perfect for meaningful new baby gifts and compact for easy gifting, making your selection process simple and enjoyable.

Buy With Confidence: At Baby Box Shop, our UK-made baby girl boxes and keepsakes meet EN71 Safety Standards and are safe from birth. Trust us for unique gifts and keepsakes, all backed by our commitment to quality.
